name: Apple Harvest Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan, then set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flours, sugars, cinnamon, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. Add oil, vanilla, and eggs to the dry ingredients. Beat until well mixed.
4. Stir in the chopped apples and walnuts.
5. Spoon batter evenly into prepared pan.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan for 12 minutes, then invert the cake onto a wire rack. Allow it to cool thoroughly.
8. For the glaze, sift 1/2 cup powdered sugar into a small mixing bowl. Add 1/4 teaspoon vanilla and enough milk to achieve a drizzling consistency.
9. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake, or dollop sweetened whipped cream on top for serving.
